prompt: A generative abstract art piece — flowing organic ribbons of color suspended in a dark space, suggesting liquid mercury caught mid-motion. Color palette: deep midnight indigo background with ribbons in graduated coral, soft peach, lavender, and a single thread of warm gold. Smooth volumetric lighting, subtle depth of field, the ribbons catching specular highlights. Extremely high detail surface micro-texture, dreamlike. No text, no figures, no recognizable objects. Centered composition, balanced weight, gallery-art quality.
